# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# TABLA: Expresión de genes TRIM por órgano
# Ejecutar en la consola de R DESPUÉS de correr el RMD completo
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)

# 1. Conteos normalizados sólo para genes TRIM detectados
trim_norm <- as.data.frame(conteos_normalizados) %>%
  rownames_to_column("ensembl_gene_id") %>%
  filter(ensembl_gene_id %in% trim_genes$ensembl_gene_id)

# 2. Añadir nombre del gen
trim_norm <- left_join(
  trim_norm,
  trim_genes %>% select(ensembl_gene_id, external_gene_name),
  by = "ensembl_gene_id"
)

# 3. Pivotear a formato largo (muestra → órgano)
trim_long <- trim_norm %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols      = -c(ensembl_gene_id, external_gene_name),
    names_to  = "sample_id",
    values_to = "norm_count"
  ) %>%
  left_join(metadata %>% select(sample_id, organ), by = "sample_id")

# 4. Calcular la media de conteos normalizados por gen y órgano
trim_por_organo <- trim_long %>%
  group_by(ensembl_gene_id, external_gene_name, organ) %>%
  summarise(mean_norm_count = round(mean(norm_count), 2), .groups = "drop")

# 5. Tabla ancha: genes en filas, órganos en columnas (conteos medios)
tabla_wide_counts <- trim_por_organo %>%
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols     = c(ensembl_gene_id, external_gene_name),
    names_from  = organ,
    values_from = mean_norm_count
  ) %>%
  arrange(external_gene_name)

# 6. Tabla ancha: expresado (1) / no expresado (0) con umbral de 10 conteos
umbral_expresion <- 10

tabla_wide_binaria <- trim_por_organo %>%
  mutate(expresado = ifelse(mean_norm_count >= umbral_expresion, 1, 0)) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols     = c(ensembl_gene_id, external_gene_name),
    names_from  = organ,
    values_from = expresado
  ) %>%
  arrange(external_gene_name)

# 7. Exportar ambas tablas como TSV
write.table(
  tabla_wide_counts,
  file      = file.path(dir_tablas, paste0("TRIM_expresion_por_organo_conteos_", organism_tag, ".tsv")),
  sep       = "\t",
  row.names = FALSE,
  quote     = FALSE
)

write.table(
  tabla_wide_binaria,
  file      = file.path(dir_tablas, paste0("TRIM_expresion_por_organo_binaria_", organism_tag, ".tsv")),
  sep       = "\t",
  row.names = FALSE,
  quote     = FALSE
)

cat("✓ Tablas guardadas en:", dir_tablas, "\n")
cat("  - Conteos medios normalizados por órgano\n")
cat("  - Tabla binaria expresado/no expresado (umbral ≥", umbral_expresion, "conteos)\n")
cat("\nVista previa (binaria):\n")
print(tabla_wide_binaria, n = 20)
